title: Slovakia — Individual Income Tax Return, Type A (DPFOAv25)
description:
The Financial Administration of the Slovak Republic's (Finančná správa Slovenskej republiky, FS SR) DPFOAv25 form — "Daňové priznanie k dani z príjmov fyzickej osoby (typ A)" (Type A individual income tax return) for the 2025 tax year, valid from 1 January 2026, filed under § 5 of Act No. 595/2003 Z.z. on income tax (as amended). Type A is used by a taxpayer whose only income during the tax year was employment income (income from a dependent activity, § 5 of the Act); a taxpayer with other income types (self-employment, capital, rental, other) uses the separate Type B return instead, out of this schema's scope. This v1.0.0 models the return's full eleven-section structure in detail: header (return type, taxpayer identification, tax year), Section I (taxpayer data, including a non-resident/limited-tax-liability branch), Section II (legal representative/heir data), Section III (tax-base reduction for a qualifying pension and a spouse, and the tax bonus for one dependent child plus a second-eligible-person sharing arrangement), Section IV (mortgage-interest tax bonus), Section V (tax base from employment income), Section VI (the full tax computation, including the foreign-income exemption and foreign-tax-credit methods, the child tax bonus, and the mortgage-interest tax bonus), Section VII (differences reported on an additional/corrective return), Section VIII (the 2%/3% tax-share donation to a recipient organization or a parent), Section IX (free-text special records, plus a single foreign-employment-income detail row), Section X (further taxpayer data for cross-border cases), and Section XI (the payout/refund request for the tax bonus, employee bonus, mortgage-interest bonus, or a tax overpayment).

The source is a genuine client-side, JavaScript-driven fillable HTML e-form (not a PDF/AcroForm), served from the Financial Administration's own eFormVzor form-template subdomain; each field's real name attribute, maxlength, and (where present) its own client-side validation-hint text (the source's own title attribute) were extracted directly from the form's HTML. Several line items are themselves computed/derived amounts the source's own client-side script calculates from other lines (e.g. r.45's tax-bracket formula, or r.71/r.72's final payable/overpayment formula); these are modeled as ordinary editable data fields exactly as the source itself presents them (each such formula is disclosed in the field's own description), following this registry's established practice for other richly cross-referenced tax-computation forms (e.g. kr/nts's year-end tax settlement).

Scope decisions disclosed here and in VERIFICATION.md: (1) the roughly 250-entry country/territory dropdown (Section IX's foreign-income country code) is modeled as a free-text numeric-code string rather than enumerated in full; (2) the two 12-checkbox month-selection grids (Section III, r.31 and r.32) are each modeled as one boolean "full year" flag plus one comma-separated multi-select-as-string field for individual months, pending GSP-0009 (repeating/multi-select gap); (3) Section III's dependent-child table prints only a single child row on the source form itself (additional children are declared in Section IX free text, per the source's own r.31a instruction), so no bounded repeating group was invented for it. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Slovak Republic or the Financná správa Slovenskej republiky.

authority.name: Finančná správa Slovenskej republiky (Financial Administration of the Slovak Republic)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2981, opening Slovakia as a new jurisdiction via its Taxes vertical. financnasprava.sk's site-wide outage (first observed GOV-2969, still live as of GOV-2976 on 2026-07-14) was re-checked at the start of this cycle and remains live with no ETA; the source was retrieved instead from a Wayback Machine capture (timestamp 20260521100832, 21 May 2026) of pfseform.financnasprava.sk's own live e-form HTML, per this registry's established practice of citing a Wayback snapshot when a first-party government source is genuinely, verifiably unreachable at authoring time. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing and field-extraction record.

fields.name: returnType
fields.label: Druh daňového priznania (Type of tax return)
fields.description: Whether this is an ordinary, corrective (replacing an ordinary return before the filing deadline), or additional (dodatočné, filed after the deadline to correct a previously filed return) tax return. Section VII (differences from an additional return) applies only when this is 'additional'.
fields.sourceRef: Header, radio group "Druh daňového priznania": daňové priznanie / opravné daňové priznanie / dodatočné daňové priznanie

fields.name: taxpayerTin
fields.label: 01 - DIČ (ak nie je pridelené, uvádza sa rodné číslo)
fields.description: Taxpayer's tax identification number (DIČ), or birth number (rodné číslo) if no DIČ has been assigned. The source requires either this field or taxpayerBirthDateIfNoTin (r.02) to be filled; both are modeled optional since the meta-schema's requiredWhen only supports a clean field-equals-value gate, not an either/or across two optional fields.
fields.sourceRef: Header, r.01 field "01 - DIČ (ak nie je pridelené, uvádza sa rodné číslo)"

fields.name: taxpayerBirthDateIfNoTin
fields.label: 02 - Dátum narodenia
fields.description: Taxpayer's date of birth, completed only if the taxpayer has been assigned neither a DIČ nor a rodné číslo (birth number). See taxpayerTin.

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Za rok (Tax year)
fields.description: The tax year for which the return is filed. The source form is the 2025 edition; the source's own instruction allows entering 2026 only when filing a return on behalf of a deceased taxpayer.

fields.name: additionalReturnDiscoveryDate
fields.label: Dátum zistenia skutočnosti na podanie dodatočného daňového priznania
fields.description: Date the fact requiring an additional (corrective, post-deadline) tax return was discovered. Required only when returnType is 'additional'; an additional return may only be filed after the ordinary filing deadline has passed, except when filing on behalf of a deceased taxpayer.
fields.sourceRef: Header, field "Dátum zistenia skutočnosti na podanie dodatočného daňového priznania"

fields.name: taxpayerTitleBeforeName
fields.label: 05 - Titul pred menom
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, r.05 "Titul pred menom/za priezviskom" (first of two title boxes)

fields.name: taxpayerTitleAfterName
fields.label: 05 - Titul za priezviskom
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, r.05 "Titul pred menom/za priezviskom" (second of two title boxes)

fields.name: permanentAddressStreet
fields.label: 06 - Ulica (trvalý pobyt)
fields.description: Street of the taxpayer's permanent residence address as of the filing date, in the Slovak Republic or abroad.
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, permanent-residence address block, r.06 street

fields.name: permanentAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: 07 - Číslo domu (trvalý pobyt)
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, permanent-residence address block, r.07 house number

fields.name: permanentAddressPostalCode
fields.label: 08 - PSČ (trvalý pobyt)
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, permanent-residence address block, r.08 postal code

fields.name: permanentAddressMunicipality
fields.label: 09 - Obec (trvalý pobyt)
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, permanent-residence address block, r.09 municipality

fields.name: permanentAddressCountry
fields.label: 10 - Štát (trvalý pobyt)
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, permanent-residence address block, r.10 country

fields.name: isNonResident
fields.label: 11 - Daňový nerezident
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer is a non-resident for tax purposes (a taxpayer with limited tax liability in Slovakia). Checking this gates Section X (further taxpayer data) and the residency-period fields below.

fields.name: nonResidentPeriodFrom
fields.label: Obdobie od (nerezident)
fields.description: Start of the period during the tax year for which the taxpayer was a non-resident with limited tax liability in Slovakia.

fields.name: nonResidentPeriodTo
fields.label: Obdobie do (nerezident)
fields.description: End of the period during the tax year for which the taxpayer was a non-resident with limited tax liability in Slovakia.

fields.name: foreignTin
fields.label: Identifikačné číslo na daňové účely (TIN)
fields.description: Taxpayer identification number (TIN) assigned in the taxpayer's state of tax residence, completed when the taxpayer is a non-resident of Slovakia.
fields.sourceRef: I. ODDIEL, r.11 field "Identifikačné číslo na daňové účely (TIN), pridelené v štáte daňovej rezidencie"

fields.name: srResidenceStreet
fields.label: 12 - Ulica (pobyt v SR)
fields.description: Street of the address of the dwelling/stay in the Slovak Republic where the taxpayer resided during the tax period. Completed only when the taxpayer has no permanent residence in Slovakia.

fields.name: representativeSurname
fields.label: 16 - Priezvisko (zástupca)
fields.description: Surname of the legal representative, heir, or other representative filing this return on the taxpayer's behalf, if any.

fields.name: representativeTitleBeforeName
fields.label: 18 - Titul pred menom (zástupca)
fields.sourceRef: II. ODDIEL, r.18 (first of two title boxes)

fields.name: representativeTitleAfterName
fields.label: 18 - Titul za priezviskom (zástupca)
fields.sourceRef: II. ODDIEL, r.18 (second of two title boxes)

fields.name: representativeBirthNumberPart1
fields.label: 19 - Rodné číslo (zástupca), 1. časť
fields.description: First part of the representative's Slovak birth number (rodné číslo); if the representative has no birth number, their date of birth in DDMM form.

fields.name: representativeBirthNumberPart2
fields.label: 19 - Rodné číslo (zástupca), 2. časť
fields.description: Second part of the representative's Slovak birth number; if no birth number, their birth year in RRRR form.

fields.name: contactPhoneNumber
fields.label: 25 - Telefónne číslo
fields.description: Contact phone number: the taxpayer's own number if filing personally, otherwise the representative's number, unless otherwise agreed with the taxpayer. Not a mandatory field under § 32 ods. 7 of the Income Tax Act.

fields.name: contactEmail
fields.label: 26 - Emailová adresa
fields.description: Contact email address (see contactPhoneNumber). The source form limits the total length to 254 characters, with 1-64 characters required before the '@'.

fields.name: receivedPensionAtStartOfYear
fields.label: 27 - Poberal(a) som dôchodok k začiatku zdaňovacieho obdobia
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer was receiving, at the start of the tax year (or was awarded retroactively to the start of the tax year), one of the pensions listed in § 11 ods. 6 of the Income Tax Act.

fields.name: totalPensionAmount
fields.label: 28 - Úhrnná suma dôchodku(ov) za zdaňovacie obdobie, EUR
fields.description: Total amount of the pension(s) referred to in r.27 received during the tax year, completed only if claiming the reduction of the tax base.

fields.name: spouseFullName
fields.label: 29 - Priezvisko a meno (manželka/manžel)
fields.description: Surname and given name of the spouse living with the taxpayer in the same household, for the purpose of claiming the non-taxable amount on a spouse under § 11 ods. 3.

fields.name: claimSpouseNonTaxableAmount
fields.label: 30 - Uplatňujem nezdaniteľnú časť základu dane na manželku (manžela)

fields.name: spouseOwnIncomeAmount
fields.label: Vlastné príjmy manželky (manžela), EUR
fields.description: Spouse's own income for the tax year (gross income less compulsory insurance premiums/contributions the spouse was required to pay on it).

fields.name: spouseQualifyingMonthsCount
fields.label: Počet mesiacov (manželka/manžel)
fields.description: Number of calendar months in the tax year at the start of which the statutory conditions for claiming the spouse's non-taxable amount were met.

fields.name: childFullName
fields.label: 31 - Priezvisko a meno (dieťa)
fields.description: Surname and given name of a dependent child living with the taxpayer in the same household, for the purpose of the tax bonus (daňový bonus) under § 33. Only one child's data row is printed on the source form; a taxpayer with more than one qualifying child records the additional children in Section IX (additionalChildrenNoted).

fields.name: childBonusFullYear
fields.label: 31 - Daňový bonus uplatňujem v mesiacoch 1-12
fields.description: Whether the tax bonus is claimed for all 12 months of the tax year (the source form's dedicated "1-12" checkbox, mutually exclusive with checking individual months in childBonusMonths).

fields.name: childBonusMonths
fields.label: 31 - Daňový bonus uplatňujem v mesiacoch (jednotlivo)
fields.description: Comma-separated list of individual calendar months (1-12) for which the tax bonus is claimed, used only when not claiming the full year (see childBonusFullYear). The source presents this as 12 separate month checkboxes; modeled as a comma-separated list — multi-select-as-string treatment, pending GSP-0009 (repeating/multi-select gap) — following the precedent already established for several other schemas in this registry (e.g. fr/france-visas/schengen-visa-application's means-of-support fields).
fields.sourceRef: III. ODDIEL, r.31, 12 individual month checkboxes

fields.name: additionalChildrenNoted
fields.label: 31a - Údaje o ďalších vyživovaných deťoch uvádzam v IX. oddiele
fields.description: Checked when the taxpayer has more than one qualifying dependent child and records the additional children's data in Section IX (free-text special-records section) rather than on the single printed child row.

fields.name: applySecondEligiblePersonProcedure
fields.label: Uplatňujem postup podľa § 33 ods. 8 zákona
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer applies the procedure under § 33 ods. 8 (increasing their own tax base by a second eligible person's tax base, for the purpose of computing entitlement to the tax bonus) rather than each eligible person claiming it separately.
fields.sourceRef: III. ODDIEL, second-eligible-person block, checkbox "Uplatňujem postup podľa § 33 ods. 8 zákona"

fields.name: secondEligiblePersonFullName
fields.label: 32 - Priezvisko a meno (druhá oprávnená osoba)
fields.description: Surname and given name of the second person eligible to claim the tax bonus on the same child(ren) named in r.31, sharing custody/care of the household.

fields.name: secondEligiblePersonBonusMonths
fields.label: 32 - Mesiace jednotlivo (druhá oprávnená osoba)
fields.description: Comma-separated list of individual calendar months (1-12) at the start of which the second eligible person met the conditions for the tax bonus. Multi-select-as-string treatment, pending GSP-0009 (see childBonusMonths).
fields.sourceRef: III. ODDIEL, r.32, 12 individual month checkboxes

fields.name: secondPersonFiledReturnInSlovakia
fields.label: Druhá oprávnená osoba podala daňové priznanie na území SR
fields.description: Whether the second eligible person named in r.32 themselves filed a tax return in Slovakia reporting a tax base for computing the tax bonus.
fields.sourceRef: III. ODDIEL, checkbox "Oznamujem, že druhá oprávnená osoba uvedená na r. 32 podala daňové priznanie na území Slovenskej republiky"

fields.name: secondPersonAnnualSettlementCopyAttached
fields.label: Prikladám kópiu dokladu o ročnom zúčtovaní (druhá oprávnená osoba)
fields.description: Checked when a copy of the second eligible person's annual payroll-tax-advance settlement (ročné zúčtovanie) is attached, as evidence of their tax base, because they did not file their own tax return.
fields.sourceRef: III. ODDIEL, checkbox "kópiu dokladu o vykonanom ročnom zúčtovaní ... druhej oprávnenej osoby"

fields.name: secondPersonTaxBaseDocumentCopyAttached
fields.label: Prikladám kópiu dokladu preukazujúceho základ dane (druhá oprávnená osoba)
fields.description: Checked when a copy of a document proving the second eligible person's tax base from employment income is attached, for a person who had neither an annual settlement performed nor a duty to file a return.
fields.sourceRef: III. ODDIEL, checkbox "kópiu dokladu preukazujúceho výšku základu dane ... druhej oprávnenej osoby"

fields.name: secondEligiblePersonTaxBaseAmount
fields.label: 32a - Základ dane druhej oprávnenej osoby, EUR
fields.description: Tax base (or aggregate tax base) of the second eligible person named in r.32, from employment income and/or self-employment/other independent gainful activity, for the purpose of claiming the tax bonus under § 33 ods. 8.

fields.name: claimMortgageInterestBonus
fields.label: 33 - Uplatňujem daňový bonus na zaplatené úroky
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer claims the tax bonus on interest paid on a home-loan (§ 33a of the Income Tax Act).

fields.name: mortgageInterestPaidAmount
fields.label: 33 - Suma zaplatených úrokov za zdaňovacie obdobie, EUR
fields.description: Amount of home-loan interest paid during the tax year, per the bank's own confirmation issued under § 26a of Act No. 90/2016 Coll. on housing loans, a copy of which is an annexe to the return. Required alongside claimMortgageInterestBonus. The source's input widget for this line shares a generic 400-character textbox component also used for combined name fields elsewhere on the form; it is modeled here as a numeric amount per the footnote's own description of what r.33 records.

fields.name: mortgageInterestQualifyingMonthsCount
fields.label: 33 - Počet mesiacov (úroky)
fields.description: Number of calendar months in the tax year for which the taxpayer is entitled to the mortgage-interest tax bonus.

fields.name: mortgageInterestAccrualStartDate
fields.label: Dátum začatia úročenia úveru
fields.description: Date interest began accruing on the home loan. Must fall within 1 February 2020 - 31 December 2025 per the source's own validation note.
fields.sourceRef: IV. ODDIEL, field "Dátum začatia úročenia úveru"

fields.name: mortgageLoanAgreementDate
fields.label: Dátum uzavretia zmluvy o úvere na bývanie
fields.description: Date the home-loan agreement was concluded. Must fall within 1 January 2018 - 31 December 2025 per the source's own validation note.
fields.sourceRef: IV. ODDIEL, field "Dátum uzavretia zmluvy o úvere na bývanie"

fields.name: totalEmploymentIncome
fields.label: 34 - Úhrn príjmov od všetkých zamestnávateľov, EUR
fields.description: Total employment income from all employers during the tax year. A non-resident reports only Slovak-source income; a resident reports worldwide income.

fields.name: incomeFromNonEmploymentWorkAgreements
fields.label: 35 - Úhrn príjmov z dohôd o prácach vykonávaných mimo pracovného pomeru, EUR
fields.description: Of the total on r.34, the portion arising from agreements for work performed outside an employment relationship (dohody). Must not exceed totalEmploymentIncome.

fields.name: totalMandatoryInsuranceContributions
fields.label: 36 - Úhrn povinného poistného, EUR
fields.description: Total compulsory social/health insurance premiums and contributions paid on the employment income in r.34.

fields.name: socialInsuranceContributions
fields.label: 37 - Úhrn poistného na sociálne poistenie, EUR
fields.description: Of the total on r.36, the portion for social insurance (security) contributions. Must not exceed totalMandatoryInsuranceContributions.

fields.name: healthInsuranceContributions
fields.label: 38 - Úhrn poistného na zdravotné poistenie, EUR
fields.description: Of the total on r.36, the portion for health insurance contributions. Must not exceed totalMandatoryInsuranceContributions.

fields.name: taxBaseFromEmploymentIncome
fields.label: 39 - Základ dane podľa § 5 ods. 8 zákona, EUR
fields.description: Tax base from employment income: r.39 = Max(0; r.34 - r.36). The tax base cannot be negative.

fields.name: nonTaxableAmountSelf
fields.label: 40 - Nezdaniteľná časť základu dane na daňovníka, EUR
fields.description: Non-taxable part of the tax base on the taxpayer, computed per § 11 ods. 2, using the source's own worked reference table at the end of the guidance notes.

fields.name: nonTaxableAmountSpouse
fields.label: 41 - Nezdaniteľná časť základu dane na manželku (manžela), EUR
fields.description: Non-taxable part of the tax base claimed on a spouse under § 11 ods. 3, requiring spouseFullName/claimSpouseNonTaxableAmount to be completed.

fields.name: supplementaryPensionContributionsDeduction
fields.label: 42 - Príspevky na doplnkové dôchodkové sporenie, EUR
fields.description: Non-taxable part of the tax base for verifiably paid contributions to a pan-European personal pension product and supplementary pension savings, up to an aggregate EUR 180 (§ 11 ods. 8).

fields.name: totalTaxBaseReduction
fields.label: 43 - Spolu (r. 40 + r. 41 + r. 42), EUR
fields.description: Sum of r.40 + r.41 + r.42, capped at the tax base in r.39.

fields.name: reducedTaxBase
fields.label: 44 - Základ dane znížený o r. 43, EUR
fields.description: Tax base from r.39 reduced by r.43 and increased by any contribution add-back under § 11 ods. 11 and § 52zza ods. 2.

fields.name: taxAmountUnderSection15
fields.label: 45 - Daň podľa § 15 zákona zo základu dane z r. 44, EUR
fields.description: Income tax computed on the tax base in r.44: 19% up to EUR 48,441.43, and 19% on the first EUR 48,441.43 plus 25% on the excess above that threshold (r.45 = 48441.43*0.19 + (r.44-48441.43)*0.25 when r.44 exceeds the threshold). Zero if the taxpayer claims the employee bonus (r.46).

fields.name: employeeBonus
fields.label: 46 - Zamestnanecká prémia, EUR
fields.description: Employee bonus (zamestnanecká prémia) under § 32a, available to certain low-income employees in place of the ordinary tax computation.

fields.name: incorrectlyPaidEmployeeBonusAmount
fields.label: 47 - Suma zamestnaneckej prémie nesprávne vyplatenej, EUR
fields.description: Amount of employee bonus incorrectly paid out by the employer or the tax administrator.

fields.name: totalExemptForeignIncome
fields.label: 48 - Úhrn vyňatých príjmov (základov dane), EUR
fields.description: Total income (tax bases) exempted from Slovak taxation under a double-taxation treaty's exemption method, capped at r.39.

fields.name: taxBaseAfterExemption
fields.label: 49 - Základ dane znížený o r. 48, EUR
fields.description: Tax base from r.44 reduced by the exempted income in r.48; zero if the result would be negative.

fields.name: taxAfterExemption
fields.label: 50 - Daň po vyňatí príjmov zo zdrojov v zahraničí, EUR
fields.description: Tax under § 15 computed on the tax base in r.49 after the foreign-income exemption. The 25% bracket threshold is EUR 48,441.43.

fields.name: totalForeignSourceIncome
fields.label: 51 - Úhrn príjmov (základov dane) zo zdrojov v zahraničí, EUR
fields.description: Total foreign-source income (tax bases) for which a foreign tax credit is claimed (credit method), capped at r.39.

fields.name: foreignTaxPaid
fields.label: 52 - Daň zaplatená v zahraničí z príjmov z r. 51, EUR
fields.description: Foreign tax actually paid on the income in r.51.

fields.name: creditPercentageCalculation
fields.label: 53 - Výpočet percenta dane na účely zápočtu, %
fields.description: Credit percentage: [(r.39 - r.48) or r.39] x 100, used to compute the creditable foreign tax.

fields.name: creditableForeignTaxAmountBeforeCap
fields.label: 54 - Z dane zaplatenej v zahraničí možno započítať, EUR
fields.description: Amount of foreign tax that may be credited before the r.52 cap is applied: [(r.50 or r.45) x r.53] / 100.

fields.name: recognizedForeignTaxCredit
fields.label: 55 - Daň uznaná na zápočet, EUR
fields.description: Foreign tax credit recognized: r.54 capped at r.52 (r.55 = Max(0, Min(r.54, r.52))).

fields.name: taxLiability
fields.label: 56 - Daň (daňová povinnosť), EUR
fields.description: Final tax liability: r.45 or r.50, further reduced by the recognized foreign tax credit r.55 where applicable. Reported as zero in several statutorily defined low-liability/low-income cases per the source's own footnote 10.

fields.name: increasedTaxBaseForChildBonus
fields.label: 56a - Navýšený základ dane na účely výpočtu daňového bonusu, EUR
fields.description: Tax base increased for the purpose of computing the tax bonus under § 33 ods. 8: r.32a / 12 x number of checked months in r.32, plus r.39. Completed only when the taxpayer applies the § 33 ods. 8 procedure.

fields.name: childBonusEntitlement
fields.label: 57 - Nárok na daňový bonus podľa zákona, EUR
fields.description: Entitlement to the statutory tax bonus for the dependent child(ren) named in r.31/Section IX: EUR 100/month for a child under 15, EUR 50/month for a child 15 up to and including 18.

fields.name: taxAfterChildBonus
fields.label: 58 - Daň znížená o daňový bonus podľa zákona, EUR
fields.description: Tax liability (r.56) reduced by the tax bonus (r.57); zero if r.57 exceeds r.56.

fields.name: childBonusPaidByEmployer
fields.label: 59 - Suma daňového bonusu priznaného a vyplateného zamestnávateľom, EUR

fields.name: childBonusPayableByTaxAuthority
fields.label: 61 - Suma daňového bonusu na poukázanie správcom dane, EUR
fields.description: max(0, r.60 - r.56). A positive amount here requires completing the payout request in Section XI.

fields.name: childBonusOverpaidByEmployer
fields.label: 62 - Suma daňového bonusu vyplatená zamestnávateľom nesprávne alebo vo vyššej sume, EUR

fields.name: mortgageInterestBonusEntitlement
fields.label: 63 - Nárok na daňový bonus na zaplatené úroky, EUR
fields.description: Entitlement to the mortgage-interest tax bonus under § 33a: 50% of interest paid, capped at EUR 400/year for loan agreements concluded by 31 December 2023 or EUR 1,200/year for agreements concluded after that date.

fields.name: taxAfterMortgageInterestBonus
fields.label: 64 - Daň znížená o daňový bonus podľa zákona a o daňový bonus na zaplatené úroky, EUR

fields.name: mortgageInterestBonusPaidByEmployer
fields.label: 65 - Suma daňového bonusu na zaplatené úroky priznaného a vyplateného zamestnávateľom, EUR
fields.description: Completed only in a return filed after an annual settlement (ročné zúčtovanie).

fields.name: mortgageInterestBonusPayableByTaxAuthority
fields.label: 67 - Suma daňového bonusu na zaplatené úroky na poukázanie správcom dane, EUR
fields.description: max(0, r.66 - r.58). A positive amount here requires completing the payout request in Section XI.

fields.name: advancesPaidUnderSection34
fields.label: 68 - Úhrn preddavkov zaplatených podľa § 34 zákona, EUR

fields.name: advancesWithheldUnderSection35
fields.label: 69 - Úhrn preddavkov zrazených podľa § 35 zákona, EUR
fields.description: Advances withheld under § 35, excluding advances under § 35 ods. 10 and 11.

fields.name: advancesPaidUnderSection35Para10And11
fields.label: 70 - Úhrn preddavkov zaplatených podľa § 35 ods. 10 a 11 zákona, EUR

fields.name: taxPayable
fields.label: 71 - Daň na úhradu (+), EUR
fields.description: Tax payable: r.56 - r.57 + r.59 + r.61 - r.63 + r.65 + r.67 - r.68 - r.69 - r.70 + r.47, when positive. Not payable if EUR 5 or less.

fields.name: taxOverpayment
fields.label: 72 - Daňový preplatok (-), EUR
fields.description: Tax overpayment: the negative of the same formula as taxPayable, expressed as a positive overpayment amount.

fields.name: priorReturnTaxAmount
fields.label: 73 - Daň z r. 56 predchádzajúceho daňového priznania, EUR
fields.description: Tax liability (r.56) from the return being corrected, or the corresponding line of a prior Type B return or annual settlement.

fields.name: taxIncreaseOrDecrease
fields.label: 74 - Zvýšenie (+) alebo zníženie (-) dane, EUR
fields.description: r.56 - r.73, positive or negative.

fields.name: priorReturnTaxPayableOrOverpayment
fields.label: 75 - Daň na úhradu alebo daňový preplatok z predchádzajúceho daňového priznania, EUR
fields.description: r.71 or r.72 from the return being corrected (or the corresponding line of a prior Type B return or annual settlement).

fields.name: adjustedTaxPayableOrOverpayment
fields.label: 76 - Daň na úhradu (+) alebo daňový preplatok (-), EUR
fields.description: (r.71 or r.72) - r.75, adjusted for any tax-share donation (2%/3%) difference exceeding zero.

fields.name: priorReturnChildBonusPayable
fields.label: 77 - Suma daňového bonusu na poukázanie správcom dane z predchádzajúceho daňového priznania, EUR

fields.name: childBonusPayableDifference
fields.label: 78 - Rozdiel súm daňového bonusu na poukázanie (+) alebo vrátenie (-), EUR
fields.description: r.61 - r.77, positive (payable by the tax administrator) or negative (repayable to the tax administrator).

fields.name: priorReturnMortgageInterestBonusPayable
fields.label: 79 - Suma daňového bonusu na zaplatené úroky na poukázanie z predchádzajúceho daňového priznania, EUR

fields.name: mortgageInterestBonusPayableDifference
fields.label: 80 - Rozdiel súm daňového bonusu na zaplatené úroky na poukázanie (+) alebo vrátenie (-), EUR
fields.description: r.67 - r.79, positive or negative.

fields.name: doesNotApplyTaxShareProcedure
fields.label: Neuplatňujem postup podľa § 50 zákona
fields.description: Checked when the taxpayer does not designate any portion of paid tax to a recipient organization under § 50; when checked, r.81/r.82 are not completed.
fields.sourceRef: VIII. ODDIEL, checkbox "neuplatňujem postup podľa § 50 zákona"

fields.name: recipientOrganizationId
fields.label: 81 - IČO (prijímateľ)
fields.description: Company/organization identification number (IČO, 8 or 12 digits) of the designated recipient of the tax-share donation. The recipient must appear on the Notarial Chamber's own list of eligible recipients for the relevant year.

fields.name: recipientOrganizationName
fields.label: Obchodné meno (názov) (prijímateľ)
fields.description: Business name of the designated recipient organization named in r.81.

fields.name: meetsVolunteering3PercentCondition
fields.label: Spĺňam podmienky na poukázanie 3% z dane
fields.description: Checked when the taxpayer performed at least 40 hours of volunteer activity during the tax year (Act No. 406/2011 Coll.), raising the eligible donation share from 2% to 3% of tax paid; a written confirmation of the volunteer activity must be attached.
fields.sourceRef: VIII. ODDIEL, checkbox "spĺňam podmienky na poukázanie 3 % z dane"

fields.name: taxShareDonationAmount
fields.label: 82 - 2% alebo 3% zo zaplatenej dane, EUR
fields.description: Amount of tax share (2%, or 3% if meetsVolunteering3PercentCondition) designated to the recipient in r.81, minimum EUR 3.

fields.name: consentToShareDataWithRecipient
fields.label: Súhlasím so zaslaním údajov prijímateľovi
fields.description: Consent to send the taxpayer's name, surname, and permanent residence to the recipient designated in r.81, per § 50 ods. 8.
fields.sourceRef: VIII. ODDIEL, checkbox "súhlasím so zaslaním údajov ... prijímateľovi"

fields.name: doesNotApplyParentProcedure
fields.label: Neuplatňujem postup podľa § 50aa zákona
fields.description: Checked when the taxpayer does not designate a share of paid tax to a parent (or parents) under § 50aa.
fields.sourceRef: VIII. ODDIEL, checkbox "neuplatňujem postup podľa § 50aa zákona"

fields.name: inSubstituteParentalCare
fields.label: Bol som zverený do starostlivosti nahrádzajúcej starostlivosť rodičov
fields.description: Checked when the taxpayer designates their tax share to a person into whose substitute parental care they were placed by a competent authority's decision, a copy of which is attached.
fields.sourceRef: VIII. ODDIEL, checkbox "bol som zverený do starostlivosti nahrádzajúcej starostlivosť rodičov"

fields.name: hasSpecialNotes
fields.label: Uvádzam osobitné záznamy
fields.description: Checked when the taxpayer records any special notes in Section IX (e.g. additional dependent children beyond the single printed row, or foreign-source employment income detail).

fields.name: foreignEmploymentIncomeCountryCode
fields.label: Kód štátu (príjmy zo zdrojov v zahraničí)
fields.description: Numeric country/territory code (per Decree of the Statistical Office of the Slovak Republic No. 112/2012 Z.z., as amended by No. 108/2014 Z.z.) of the state where employment income within r.34 was earned, for a resident with unlimited tax liability. The source presents this as a dropdown of about 250 countries/territories; not enumerated here as a validation.enum given its length — modeled as a free-text numeric code, a disclosed scope decision.
fields.sourceRef: IX. ODDIEL, foreign-income table, column "Kód štátu"

fields.name: foreignEmploymentExpenses
fields.label: Výdavky (zo zdrojov v zahraničí), EUR
fields.description: Compulsory insurance premiums/contributions payable by the employee, verifiably paid in Slovakia and abroad.

fields.name: foreignEmploymentExpensesAbroad
fields.label: Z toho výdavky v zahraničí, EUR
fields.description: Of the expenses above, the portion of compulsory insurance premiums/contributions verifiably paid abroad.
fields.sourceRef: IX. ODDIEL, foreign-income table, column "z toho výdavky"

fields.name: specialNotesText
fields.label: Miesto na osobitné záznamy (voľný text)
fields.description: Free-text area for any special records the taxpayer needs to disclose (e.g. additional dependent children per r.31a, or a foreign bank account's own routing details when not in IBAN format, per Section XI's own instruction).

fields.name: taxResidenceCountry
fields.label: 84 - Štát daňovej rezidencie
fields.description: State of tax residence, completed when the taxpayer has limited tax liability in Slovakia (isNonResident) — and left blank for a resident.

fields.name: totalTaxableIncomeWorldwide
fields.label: 85 - Úhrn všetkých zdaniteľných príjmov (SR a zahraničie), EUR
fields.description: Aggregate of all taxable income from Slovak and foreign sources, completed by a resident applying § 33 ods. 9, a non-resident applying § 11 ods. 7/§ 33 ods. 9/§ 33a ods. 10/§ 46a, or a taxpayer who is a second eligible person for § 33 ods. 8 purposes. Includes income taxed by withholding.

fields.name: totalTaxableIncomeSlovakSource
fields.label: 85a - Z toho úhrn zdaniteľných príjmov zo zdrojov na území SR, EUR
fields.description: Of the total in r.85, the portion from Slovak sources. Must not exceed totalTaxableIncomeWorldwide.

fields.name: attachmentCount
fields.label: 86 - Počet príloh
fields.description: Total number of all annexes/attachments accompanying this tax return.

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Dátum (vyhlásenie)
fields.description: Date of the taxpayer's declaration that all information in the return is correct and complete.

fields.name: requestChildBonusPayout
fields.label: Žiadam o vyplatenie daňového bonusu podľa zákona
fields.description: Request payout of the tax bonus (r.61) or its positive difference (r.78) by the tax authority.
fields.sourceRef: XI. ODDIEL, checkbox "Žiadam o vyplatenie daňového bonusu ... (r. 61 alebo rozdiel z r. 78)"

fields.name: requestEmployeeBonusPayout
fields.label: Žiadam o vyplatenie zamestnaneckej prémie
fields.description: Request payout of the employee bonus under § 32a (r.46) by the tax authority.
fields.sourceRef: XI. ODDIEL, checkbox "Žiadam o vyplatenie zamestnaneckej prémie ... (z r. 46)"

fields.name: requestMortgageInterestBonusPayout
fields.label: Žiadam o vyplatenie daňového bonusu na zaplatené úroky
fields.description: Request payout of the mortgage-interest tax bonus (r.67) or its positive difference (r.80) by the tax authority.
fields.sourceRef: XI. ODDIEL, checkbox "Žiadam o vyplatenie daňového bonusu na zaplatené úroky ... (r. 67 alebo rozdiel z r. 80)"

fields.name: requestOverpaymentRefund
fields.label: Žiadam o vrátenie daňového preplatku
fields.description: Request refund of the tax overpayment (r.72, or the negative difference in r.76) under § 79 of the Tax Administration Act.
fields.sourceRef: XI. ODDIEL, checkbox "Žiadam o vrátenie daňového preplatku ... (z r. 72 alebo rozdiel z r. 76)"

fields.name: payoutMethod
fields.label: Spôsob výplaty
fields.description: How a requested payout is to be made: by postal money order (up to and including EUR 15,000), to the taxpayer's own account, or to a foreign account the taxpayer is not the holder of. Exactly one of these three source radio options may be selected.
fields.sourceRef: XI. ODDIEL, radio group "poštovou poukážkou" / "na účet" / "na účet v zahraničí, ktorého nie som majiteľom"

fields.name: payoutIban
fields.label: IBAN
fields.description: IBAN for the payout, required when payoutMethod is own-account or foreign-account-not-own. Format: 2-letter country code, 2-digit check digits, up to 30 alphanumeric characters.

fields.name: payoutRequestDate
fields.label: Dátum (žiadosť o vyplatenie)
fields.description: Date of this payout/refund request.
